x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: CMDB correctness measures whether CI data reflects actual infrastructure state. Low correctness means Now Assist is reasoning over data that does not represent the real environment.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Enable CMDB Health Correctness job via: All > Configuration > CMDB Dashboard > CMDB Health Dashboard Jobs. Target: 75%+ correctness. Address top correctness detractors (orphaned, stale, duplicate CIs) identified by the health dashboard.
